title: Attempt Test Case Generation Without Selecting a Template
description: Verify that submitting the form with a requirement selected but no template chosen triggers a specific error for the missing template field.
expected_result: System shows a specific error only on the template field and does not generate any test cases. The requirement field shows no error since it was correctly selected.

test_steps.action: Navigate to the test case generation page
test_steps.expected: Test case generation page is displayed

test_steps.action: Check the first available requirement checkbox
Leave the template selector empty and click Generate Test Cases
test_steps.expected: Form submission is blocked with a template field error

test_steps.action: Verify the template error message text
Confirm no requirement error is shown
test_steps.expected: Requirement field error is not visible
